title: anemone alpina subsp. font-queri
intro: Anemone alpina subsp. font-queri, also known as the Anemone font-queri, is a rare and lesser-known species within the Anemone alpina genus, which is a type of flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, the roots and rhizomes of Anemone alpina subsp. font-queri have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anemone alpina subsp. font-queri include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its use in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of Anemone alpina subsp. font-queri can be dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures.
